name: HDFC Marriott Bonvoy Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 8 Bonvoy Points per ₹150 spent on Marriott hotel stays worldwide
4 Bonvoy Points per ₹150 on dining and international transactions
2 Bonvoy Points per ₹150 on all other retail purchases

redemptionOptions: Free nights at Marriott hotels worldwide
Shop with Points on Marriott website

welcomeBenefits.description: 5,000 Marriott Bonvoy Points on card activation
welcomeBenefits.condition: On payment of joining fee and first transaction

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹10,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas

additionalBenefits: Automatic Marriott Bonvoy Silver Elite status
8 domestic + 2 international lounge visits per year
Lower forex markup of 2% compared to most HDFC cards
Transfer Bonvoy Points to 40+ airline frequent flyer programs
Complimentary night certificate on spending milestones
pros: 8 Bonvoy Points per ₹150 on Marriott stays is excellent for hotel loyalists
Only 2% forex markup is competitive for international spends
Silver Elite status unlocked automatically with the card
Bonvoy Points transferable to 40+ airline partners for flexibility
8 domestic and 2 international lounge visits included
cons: Best value only if you stay at Marriott properties regularly
Base earn rate of 2 points per ₹150 (0.67%) is average for non-category spends
₹5L fee waiver threshold is steep for a ₹3,000 fee card
Bonvoy point value varies significantly based on redemption
idealFor: Frequent Marriott hotel guests who can benefit from Bonvoy Elite status
International travelers who want lower forex markup and lounge access
Users who prefer hotel loyalty points transferable to airline miles

faqs.question: What Marriott Bonvoy status do I get with this card?
faqs.answer: You automatically receive Marriott Bonvoy Silver Elite status, which includes 10% bonus points on hotel stays, late checkout, and enhanced Wi-Fi at Marriott properties.

faqs.question: Can I transfer Bonvoy Points to airline miles?
faqs.answer: Yes, Marriott Bonvoy Points are transferable to 40+ airline frequent flyer programs at a ratio of 3:1 (3 Bonvoy Points = 1 airline mile). A bonus of 5,000 miles is awarded for every 60,000 points transferred.

faqs.question: How much is a Bonvoy Point worth?
faqs.answer: The value varies by redemption. For hotel stays, 1 Bonvoy Point is typically worth ₹0.40-₹0.70. At peak redemptions for premium properties, value can be higher. We estimate an average of ₹0.50 per point.

faqs.question: Is the 2% forex markup competitive?
faqs.answer: Yes, 2% is among the lowest forex markups available on Indian credit cards. Most cards charge 3.5%, making this card a solid choice for international transactions.
